## Plugin reference

- Description: UUID field factory (uuidField) for building field records.
- Core:
  - Uses:
    - `fields.FieldDef`
    - `fields.FieldMeta`
    - `fields.pickMeta`
    - `fields/uuid.uuidFieldType`
  - Exports (types): `UuidFieldDef`
  - Exports (values): `uuidField`
- Cross-plugin:
  - Imported by:
    - `apps/story/generation`
    - `debug/boot-profile`
    - `debug/slow-ops`
    - `debug/trace/engine`
    - `infra/claude-cli`
    - `infra/events`
